gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ॥
transliteration: Ik-oNkaar sat naam kartaa purakh nirbha-o nirvair.
translation: One Universal Creator God. The Name Is Truth. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred.

gurmukhi: ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
transliteration: Akaal moorat ajoonee saibhaN gur parsaad.
translation: Image Of The Undying, Beyond Birth, Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace ~
